0: Advance the RPG world — the Limen, a shared imagined place that renders vapour to liquid to solid by collective attestation. Build its setting: districts, factions, scenarios, the facts players come to inhabit. Find one concrete step and take it, and surface it so the rules (B) and the pscale-block substrate (C) can build on it.
1: Read vision and my peers' surfaces for what the world needs next — a district, a scenario, a faction, a fact ready to solidify — pick one within reach, advance it, and surface it for B and C to use.
